summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals met to approve meeting minutes from February 27th and to approve five pending resolutions from prior cases. The board also discussed changing their regular meeting date from the fourth Monday to the third Monday of each month, and discussed efforts to recruit new board members, including posting on Facebook and the township website.
decisions: Approved resolutions 1 through 5 from prior cases
action_items: Check email for any new BZA applications received
Post BZA member vacancy on township Facebook page to attract applicants
Follow up with previous applicants to confirm interest in BZA positions
Implement new process to have resolutions ready for signing on meeting night or the next day
notable_topics: Approval of five pending resolutions from previous cases
Process change for signing resolutions sooner after decisions
Proposed change of meeting date from 4th Monday to 3rd Monday
Recruitment of new BZA members to fill vacancies
notes: The transcript is heavily garbled with repeated 'Board of Trustees Meeting' artifacts from poor automatic transcription. Two members (Mr. Holmes and Mr. Shaw) did not respond to roll call and appear absent. Discussion referenced Bob (likely Bob Hausermann) having left the board and being unlikely to return. The board discussed a prior case involving Troy Smith whose application details differed from what was actually proposed.
title: BZA 3-27-2023.mp4
